subject: [PATCH v2 01/13] nfsd: move struct nfsd_genl_rqstp to nfsctl.c

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch moves the definition of the struct nfsd_genl_rqstp from the header file nfsd.h to the source file nfsctl.c, where it is used. This simplifies the code and reduces the risk of inconsistencies between the header and source files.
